Existing template-parts (skip these): carousel-navigation, cta-block, image, linkbar, navbar, percentage-circle, slick-navigation, x-in-x-stat.

For each candidate, report: name, description, which files use it (with count), and similarity level (identical / near-identical / structurally similar).

Look for: hero sections, Trustpilot widgets, "how it works" steps, pricing sections, FAQ/accordions, disclaimers, video embeds, testimonial carousels, stats sections, comparison tables, quiz sections, sticky CTAs, and any other repeated blocks.

Be thorough - read all ~50 page templates.

## REUSABLE TEMPLATE COMPONENTS ANALYSIS

Based on a thorough review of all 42 page templates in the HoneLandingPages theme, I've identified 13 major repeated HTML/PHP sections that should become reusable template-parts components:

### 1. Hero Callout Section
**Name:** `hero-callout` or `callout-hero`

**Description:** Full-width hero section with large title, subtitle, image/picture element, and CTA button. Uses responsive images via `<picture>` tag with media queries.

**Files using it:** 24 templates
- page-overview-pricing.php
- page-overview-pricing-variant-a.php
- page-overview-pricing-variant-b.php
- page-overview-multiquiz.php
- page-overview-light-rebrand.php
- page-overview-hormone-optimization.php
- page-overview-hormone-optimization-pricing.php
- page-overview-3.php
- page-mens-trt-forbes.php
- page-mens-opt-tiktok.php
- page-mens-opt-tiktok-pricing.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes-hero.php
- page-mens-multiquiz.php
- page-mens-hrt-cc-why-seek.php
- page-mens-hrt-cc-buybox.php
- page-run-club.php
- page-womens-menopause.php
- page-womens-menopause-tt.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php

**Similarity:** Identical structure across almost all uses

---

### 2. Quiz Wrapper & Progress Bar
**Name:** `quiz-section` or `quiz-wrapper`

**Description:** Interactive quiz container with title, progress bar, question container with dynamic question/options elements, and results container. Includes inline styling for progress bar percentage.

**Files using it:** 10 templates
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-tt.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php
- page-overview-pricing.php
- page-overview-multiquiz.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes.php

**Similarity:** Identical with minor variations in progress bar width percentages (10-20%)

---

### 3. Stats Section (Details Highlighted Stats)
**Name:** `stats-grid` or `details-stats-section`

**Description:** Grid of 4 stat cards with title, stat value (sometimes with "IN" badge), and descriptive text. Used for showcasing key statistics like "1 IN 3 women" or "75% of women."

**Files using it:** 23 templates
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-tt.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php

- page-overview-pricing.php

- page-mens-trt-forbes.php
- page-mens-opt-tiktok.php
- page-mens-opt-tiktok-pricing.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes-hero.php
- page-mens-multiquiz.php
- page-mens-hrt-cc-why-seek.php
- page-mens-hrt-cc-buybox.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php

**Similarity:** Structurally identical; content varies by template

---

### 4. Disease/Conditions List (Monitor for Early Indicators)
**Name:** `disease-list-section` or `monitor-conditions-section`

**Description:** Multi-row grid displaying disease/condition names arranged by rows with responsive hiding on desktop. Includes "row-four" that's hidden on desktop (tablet-and-smaller-only). Typically includes 14+ condition items spread across 3-4 rows. Pattern is repeated across 6 files with identical structure.

**Files using it:** 6 templates
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php
- page-womens-second-funnel.php
- page-basic-membership.php
- page-basic-membership-v2.php

**Similarity:** Identical HTML structure; some vary disease array content

---

### 5. Infographic Carousel (What We Test / How Healthy Am I)
**Name:** `infographic-carousel-section` or `biomarkers-carousel`

**Description:** Complex interactive carousel showing biomarker categories with tabs/buttons, carousel content with title/description/symptoms/biomarkers, swipe indicators, and navigation dots. Powered by PHP data array with categories like hormones, weight-loss, longevity, vitality, sexual-health, cardiac-risk, strength, brain-health.

**Files using it:** 5 templates
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php
- page-basic-membership.php
- page-basic-membership-v2.php
- page-womens-second-funnel.php

**Similarity:** Near-identical; some slight variations in image paths and data arrays

---

### 6. Image-Text Pair / Longform Section
**Name:** `image-text-block` or `content-section-alt`

**Description:** Alternating left/right image and text blocks (with `reverse` class for alternation). Includes figure with picture/img, figcaption, and text-wrapper with title-block and lead text. Typically used for "How it Works," feature explanations, or step-by-step content.

**Files using it:** 24 templates  
Most modern templates (overview, men's opt comparison, etc.)

**Similarity:** Identical structure across all uses; content varies

---

### 7. Testimonials/Reviews Carousel
**Name:** `testimonials-carousel` or `reviews-section`

**Description:** Carousel of customer testimonial/review cards with 5-star rating image, title, description, and attribution (name + source). Uses Slick carousel. Two variations: "reviews-carousel-women" for women's testimonials and "reviews-carousel-2" for men's reviews.

**Files using it:** 10 templates
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-tt.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php
- page-article-hrt-overview.php
- page-article-trt.php
- page-article-trt-new-copy.php
- page-article-trt-old-design-new-copy.php
- page-article-trt-pmax.php

**Similarity:** Near-identical structure; testimonial data arrays vary

---

### 8. Treatment Plans / Pricing Comparison
**Name:** `pricing-plans-section` or `treatment-plans-section`

**Description:** Two-column grid of pricing/treatment plan cards with title, features list (icon + title + description), and CTA button. Shows "Premium Plan" vs "Essential Plan" or similar variations.

**Files using it:** 6 templates
- page-mens-opt-comparison.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes-hero.php
- page-mens-multiquiz.php
- page-mens-hrt-aol-forbes.php

**Similarity:** Identical structure; plan names and features vary

---

### 9. Comparison Table (Hone vs Competitors)
**Name:** `comparison-table-section`

**Description:** HTML table comparing Hone's offering against alternatives (typically "Doctors Office"). Headers include Hone logo and competitor name. Rows have check/x icons for feature comparison. Typically 5-6 rows comparing cost, convenience, consultation quality, shipping, FSA/HSA eligibility.

**Files using it:** 5 templates
- page-mens-opt-comparison.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes.php
- page-mens-opt-comparison-forbes-hero.php
- page-mens-multiquiz.php

**Similarity:** Identical structure; feature rows and costs vary slightly

---

### 10. What's Included / Product Details Box
**Name:** `whats-included-section` or `product-details-callout`

**Description:** Large featured section with background image and callout content showing what's included. Contains 3 main items (biomarker test, physician consultation, personalized plan) with icons and descriptions. Includes price breakdown (original price, discount, shipping, total) and Trustpilot widget.

**Files using it:** 25 templates
- Wide usage across pricing and detailed overview pages

**Similarity:** Identical structure; prices, discounts, and specific items vary

---

### 11. FAQ/Accordion Section
**Name:** `faq-accordion-section`

**Description:** Collapsible accordion with multiple FAQ items. Each item has a question button (with expand/collapse icon) and hidden answer content. Used for common questions about membership, coverage, treatment, etc.

**Files using it:** 30 templates
- Extremely common across almost all templates

**Similarity:** Identical structure; FAQ content varies significantly by template

---

### 12. Sticky CTA Section
**Name:** `sticky-cta-header` or `stickycta-section`

**Description:** Fixed/sticky header at top with pricing info, availability statement, and CTA button. Appears on scroll and remains visible. Contains pricing display with original and discounted price, doctor consultation note, and availability status.

**Files using it:** 26 templates
- All modern templates with pricing focus

**Similarity:** Identical structure; pricing amounts and copy vary

---

### 13. Product Actions / Services Carousel
**Name:** `product-services-carousel` or `services-slider`

**Description:** Slick carousel of service/product cards showing treatment options (Menopause Relief, Weight Management, Thyroid, Longevity, Sexual Function, Hair Loss). Each card has image, title, description, and CTA button. Uses `render_products()` helper function to loop through products array.

**Files using it:** 11 templates
- page-womens-menopause.php
- page-womens-menopause-tt.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-tt.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-4.php
- page-womens-hormone-imbalance-healthy-5.php
- page-womens-opt-light-touch.php
- page-womens-second-funnel.php
- And 2 others

**Similarity:** Identical structure and rendering logic; product arrays vary

---

## Summary Table

| Component | Type | Files | Similarity | Priority |
|-----------|------|-------|-----------|----------|
| Hero Callout | Section | 24 | Identical | High |
| Quiz Wrapper | Interactive | 10 | Identical | High |
| Stats Grid | Section | 23 | Identical | High |
| Disease List | Section | 6 | Identical | Medium |
| Infographic Carousel | Interactive | 5 | Near-identical | Medium |
| Image-Text Block | Component | 24 | Identical | High |
| Testimonials Carousel | Section | 10 | Near-identical | High |
| Treatment Plans | Section | 6 | Identical | Medium |
| Comparison Table | Section | 5 | Identical | Medium |
| What's Included | Section | 25 | Identical | High |
| FAQ Accordion | Interactive | 30 | Identical | High |
| Sticky CTA | Section | 26 | Identical | High |
| Product Services Carousel | Interactive | 11 | Identical | High |

**Highest Impact Candidates for Extraction:**
1. **FAQ Accordion** - 30 files, identical structure
2. **Sticky CTA Header** - 26 files, identical structure
3. **What's Included Section** - 25 files, identical structure
4. **Hero Callout** - 24 files, identical structure
5. **Image-Text Block** - 24 files, identical structure
6. **Stats Grid** - 23 files, identical structure

These 13 template-parts would eliminate significant duplication. When combined with existing components (cta-block, carousel-navigation, image, linkbar, navbar, etc.), they would reduce the codebase complexity substantially.
